There is a cave north-west of [[Ab'Dendriel]] where a number of [[elves]] live. It is somewhat difficult to find, and you will need a [[Machete]] or a [[Heavy Machete]] to reach it.

There are two ways to access this cave, both ways require a [[Machete]] or a [[Heavy Machete]].

*From the North:
** Fall down this hole {{Mapper Coords|127.134|123.108|7|3|text=here}}
** Walk underground, you will face 2 [[Bat]]s. You will come up {{Mapper Coords|127.115|123.115|7|3|text=here}}
*From the South:
** You can walk around the south side of the swamp area ({{Mapper Coords|127.107|123.149|7|3|text=here}}) and use your [[Machete]]/[[Heavy Machete]] to cut down the [[Jungle Grass]].

Now walk to the cave {{Mapper Coords|127.134|123.131|7|3|text=here}}. 

There are about 6 [[Snake]]s and 3 [[Elf|Elves]] on the surface.

Up the rope spot you will find 3 [[Elf|Elves]]. There is a total of 7 [[Elf|Elves]], 4 [[Elf Scout]]s and 1 [[Elf Arcanist]] in the dungeon. [[Knight]]s, be careful: If you chase an [[Elf Scout]], there is a good chance you will attract more enemies, and they can easily kill you.

== Creatures ==
{{CreatureList|type=List/Sorted
 |Snake
 |Elf
 |Elf Scout
 |Elf Arcanist
}}
